description_long: This object resembles a large, rustic loaf of bread with an irregular, natural shape and a thick, rough crust. The surface is predominantly covered in a vibrant orange, moss-like texture, giving it a unique and aged appearance, as if it has been left outdoors for some time. The bread's form is asymmetrical, with one side more rounded and the opposite side flatter and more vertical. The crust appears dense and uneven, with patches of lighter, flour-dusted areas and some smoother, bare spots. There are no visible slices or openings, and the object looks solid and heavy. The overall impression is of a hearty, artisanal bread with a weathered, earthy character.
description: A large, rustic loaf of bread with a thick, rough, orange-speckled crust and an irregular, natural shape. The surface is dense and weathered, with patches of lighter flour and moss-like textures.
description_view_0: This view shows the rounded side of the bread, heavily covered in orange, moss-like patches and some lighter, floury areas.
description_view_1: The bread appears more vertical and blocky from this angle, with the orange crust dominating the surface and a few darker, shadowed spots.
description_view_2: This side reveals a smoother, less textured surface with fewer orange patches and more visible bare crust.
description_view_3: The flattest side of the bread, mostly pale and flour-dusted with only a small area of orange crust near the edge.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rugged, with a mottled pattern of orange, moss-like growths and patches of flour dusting. There are no visible scores or seeds, and the surface is uneven and weathered.
